title: Senior civil service salaries and organograms 31 March 2013
body: "This publication contains the salaries of all Directors and Director-Generals (SCS paybands 2 and 3) in the department, as at 31 March 2013, and the numbers of staff reporting into SCS posts.  Organisational charts are not currently published here as they were in the first round of disclosure. Common-format organisational charts showing the structures across government have been generated from a central tool and links to these pages have been added below.  It should be noted that the Ministry of Justice is undergoing significant structural change. This means that the data published here should not be considered representative of the Ministry’s current structure.  Organograms  Ministry of Justice  National Offender Management Service  Criminal Cases Review Commission  Criminal Injuries Compensation Authority  Information Commissioners Office  Judicial Appointments Commission  Legal Aid Agency - Formerly Legal Services Commission  Legal Services Board  The Parole Board for England & Wales  Youth Justice Board  HM Inspectorate of Prisons  HM Inspectorate of Probation  Judicial Office  Prison and Probation Ombudsman "
